_note: FALLBACK DATA — researched snapshot, not live. Replace at runtime via Google Places API (New) once GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY + place_id are set. See src/lib/places.ts.

reviews.author: Ananya Sahu
reviews.text: Lovely all-day spot on Kanki Highstreet, right by Shoppers Stop. The arancini and Burmese khow suey are must-tries, and the coffee is genuinely good. Staff happily suggested the right dishes.

reviews.author: Vikram Patel
reviews.text: Warm, modern room and great for a work lunch in Pandri. KungFu rolls were delicious and the tea cakes are perfect with a coffee.

reviews.author: Megha Agrawal
reviews.text: Pure veg with Jain options on request, which is rare and wonderful. Oriental and continental dishes were all spot on. The Belgian chocolate jar is dangerously good.

reviews.author: Sahil Dewangan
reviews.text: Easy to find beside Shoppers Stop. Good portions, a fresh bakery counter and a friendly team. Hummus platter and cookies were both very good.

reviews.author: Ishita Rao
reviews.text: Came expecting Indore quality and mostly got it. Comfortable for meetings and a long catch-up. Service was prompt and friendly throughout.
